config.name: cisco_firewall-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_firewall-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:02:17.664952

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local ipv4_pattern = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"
local ipv6_pattern = "^%x+:%x+:.+$"

-- Cached protocol normalization map
local protocol_map = {
  tcp = "TCP",
  udp = "UDP",
  icmp = "ICMP"
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local references
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        network = {},
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local ts = record.timestamp
    if ts then
        -- Convert timestamp to UNIX ms
        local success, unix_ts = pcall(function()
            return os.time({
                year = ts:sub(8,11),
                month = os.date("*t", os.time()).month,
                day = ts:sub(5,6),
                hour = ts:sub(13,14),
                min = ts:sub(16,17),
                sec = ts:sub(19,20)
            }) * 1000
        end)
        if success then
            output.time = unix_ts
        end
    end

    -- Protocol normalization with validation
    if record.protocol then
        local proto = string.lower(record.protocol)
        output.network.protocol = protocol_map[proto] or proto
    end

    -- IP address validation and assignment
    if record.ip1 then
        local ip1 = record.ip1
        if ip1:match(ipv4_pattern) or ip1:match(ipv6_pattern) then
            output.src_endpoint.ip = ip1
            output.src_endpoint.ip_type = ip1:find(":") and "IPv6" or "IPv4"
        end
    end

    if record.ip2 then
        local ip2 = record.ip2
        if ip2:match(ipv4_pattern) or ip2:match(ipv6_pattern) then
            output.dst_endpoint.ip = ip2
            output.dst_endpoint.ip_type = ip2:find(":") and "IPv6" or "IPv4"
        end
    end

    -- Port number validation and assignment
    if record.port1 and tonumber(record.port1) then
        local port = tonumber(record.port1)
        if port >= 0 and port <= 65535 then
            output.src_endpoint.port = port
        end
    end

    if record.port2 and tonumber(record.port2) then
        local port = tonumber(record.port2)
        if port >= 0 and port <= 65535 then
            output.dst_endpoint.port = port
        end
    end

    -- Connection tracking fields
    if record.connectionId then
        output.connection_info = {
            id = tostring(record.connectionId)
        }
    end

    -- Direction mapping
    if record.direction then
        output.direction = string.upper(record.direction)
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not (output.src_endpoint.ip or output.dst_endpoint.ip) then
        return nil, "Missing required IP address fields"
    end

    -- Add default timestamp if not set
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end
